all-home health service disciplines. CMS makes outlier payments 
when the cost of care exceeds a threshold dollar amount. The outlier threshold for each 
case-mix group is the 30-day period payment amount for that group or the partial 
payment adjustment amount for the 30-day period, plus a fixed dollar loss amount, which 
is the same for all case-mix groups. The outlier payment is a proportion of the amount of 
imputed costs beyond the threshold. CMS calculates the imputed cost for each 30-day
